description: Petition to a Fāṭimid vizier concerning an allowance of a jurisconsult, which the petitioner used to receive from the auspicious office, which was to be paid to jurisconsults who registered for it. The amount promised was 400 dinars a month. The exact problem with the allowance is not clear.  Dating: First half of the 12th century. The verso contains a Judaeo-Arabic text concerning the Jewish calendar. Part of this text is written also on the recto between lines 6 and 8 of the Arabic document.
description_he: עצומה לוזיר פאטמי בנוגע להקצבה של פוסק דין שהמגיש קיבל בעבר; הסכום המובטח היה 400 דינרים לחודש; תיארוך: מחצית ראשונה של המאה ה-12
